user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new document custodian, so that each document type has an assigned custodian position
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Document Custodian screen; When I click Add new document custodian and set a document type and custodian position; Then the custodian mapping is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter custodians by Location, Department, Position and Employee class, so that I can quickly find relevant custodian mappings
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Document Custodian screen; When I set filter values and click Search; Then only matching custodian records are shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset the search filters, so that I can start a new custodian search
acceptance_criteria: Given filters are applied; When I click Reset; Then the filters clear and the full list is shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view a document custodian's details, so that I can verify the document type, custodian position and applicability
acceptance_criteria: Given custodian records exist; When I click View on a record; Then its Document type, Custodian position and Applicability are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the document custodian list, so that I see the latest custodian assignments
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Document Custodian screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads
